description: Use this API to delete the specified three-winding transformer from the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = purg3wnd(ibus, jbus, kbus, ckt)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: One of the buses connected by the three-winding transformer. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: jbus
parameters.description: The bus connected by the three-winding transformer. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: kbus
parameters.description: Other bus connected by the three-winding transformer. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ckt
parameters.description: Circuit identifier of the three-winding transformer to be deleted. (input; ‘1’ by default).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
